name: ironrace-memory
description: Rust MCP memory backend for Codex with semantic search, knowledge graph, automatic migrate-or-init bootstrap, and incremental workspace mining.

interface.longDescription: Local Rust memory backend with semantic search, KG lookups, mempalace migration, initial auto-mine, and incremental updates on hooks.
defaultPrompt: Before answering questions about prior work, decisions, project history, or people, call ironmem_search or KG tools first.
After important progress or decisions, write durable summaries back into ironrace-memory.
Use ironmem_status at session start to load memory overview and protocol guidance.
